item.title: RichCimini: Rich Cimini @RichCimini · 1min As for what DJ believes the Jets will do at 2: He’s leaning toward Bailey over Reese beca
item.description: Rich Cimini @RichCimini · 1min As for what DJ believes the Jets will do at 2: He’s leaning toward Bailey over Reese because there’s less projection. Bailey with the higher floor, Reese with the higher ceiling but there are questions about where he fits. Bailey has produced at a high level at the position he Mostrar más Cita Rich Cimini @RichCimini · 4h Daniel Jeremiah (@MoveTheSticks), just now on a media conference call, says “all signs” that he’s aware of point to the #Jets waiting until 2027 to draft their QB of the future. In other words, he’d be surprised if they take QB Ty Simpson at 16. 1 6 494

item.title:
Eric_Edholm: Around The NFL reposteó Eric Edholm @Eric_Edholm · 22min 3 TDs a game, every game
Strand also tested well at pro day,
item.description:
Around The NFL reposteó Eric Edholm @Eric_Edholm · 22min 3 TDs a game, every game
Strand also tested well at pro day, including 4.78 40 at 243 lbs Cita Tom Pelissero @TomPelissero · 1h Former Minnesota-Moorhead QB Jack Strand had pre-draft visits with the Panthers and Falcons, per sources.
A big guy (6-3⅞, 243 pounds) with a big arm, Strand holds every major school passing record, throwing for 13,155 yards and 126 TDs in 42 games. 1 4 7 12 mil

item.description: Jordan Schultz @Schultz_Report · 23min Texas Tech star WR Caleb Douglas talks about Patrick Mahomes doing his TD celebration during a game Cita Jordan Schultz @Schultz_Report · 13 abr. 0:47 Here’s what you need to know about Georgia standout WR Zachariah Branch — from the man himself! 3 4 54 22 mil
